about.title: About Memorial
about.subtitle: About This Publication
about.deck: Honoring the brave souls who gave their lives for freedom and democracy in Sudan
about.rememberText: We preserve the memory of those who sacrificed everything for a better Sudan
about.honorText: We celebrate their lives, their stories, and their unwavering courage
about.inspireText: Their legacy continues to inspire future generations to stand for justice
about.missionText1: emorial is dedicated to preserving the memory of the martyrs of the Sudanese Revolution. This platform serves as a digital memorial where their stories, photographs, and legacies are honored and remembered by current and future generations.
about.missionText2: Each profile is carefully curated with biographical information, photographs, and personal stories that capture the essence of these brave individuals who stood for freedom, justice, and democracy. We believe that by remembering their sacrifice, we honor their legacy and ensure that their courage continues to inspire.
about.dignityText: Every martyr's story is treated with the utmost dignity and respect, honoring their sacrifice and their families.
about.accuracyText: We strive for accuracy in all biographical information, working closely with families and verified sources.
about.memoryText: This memorial belongs to all Sudanese people and serves as a permanent record of the revolution's heroes.
about.quoteText: Their sacrifice shall not be forgotten.

contribute.title: Contribute to the Archive
contribute.subtitle: Help us honor and preserve the memory of the martyrs
contribute.shareInfoText: If you have biographical information, stories, or details about any of the martyrs, please share them with us. Every piece of information helps us create a more complete and accurate historical record.
contribute.submitMediaText: We are collecting photographs and videos that capture the lives and spirits of the martyrs. These visual memories are invaluable in keeping their legacies alive and providing a human connection to their stories.
contribute.shareStoriesText: Personal stories, memories, and testimonials from family members and friends help humanize the archive and remind us of the real people behind each profile. Your memories matter.
contribute.guideline1: Ensure all information is accurate and verified when possible
contribute.guideline2: Photos should be high quality and respectful in nature
contribute.guideline3: Include dates, full names, and context for all submissions
contribute.guideline4: Obtain permission from family members when sharing personal content
contribute.guideline5: Provide biographical information in both English and Arabic when possible
contribute.reviewMessage: We review all submissions carefully and with the utmost respect. Thank you for helping us preserve these important memories.
contribute.noticeText: All submissions become part of the permanent historical archive. By contributing, you help ensure these stories are never forgotten.
contribute.bottomCTA: Your contribution, no matter how small, helps preserve the memory and honor the sacrifice of the martyrs of the Sudanese Revolution.
contribute.togetherMessage: Together, we ensure their sacrifice is never forgotten.

martyrsList.title: Roll of Honor
martyrsList.subtitle: Honoring those who sacrificed for freedom
martyrsList.wallOfFacesSubtitle: Look into their eyes. Each face is a universe of dreams, cut short but never silenced.
martyrsList.noRecordsMessage: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.
martyrsList.closingQuote: They gave their tomorrow for our today.

martyrPage.recordNotFoundMessage: The requested memorial could not be located in our archives.
martyrPage.memorialMessage: May their soul rest in eternal peace. Their sacrifice will never be forgotten.
martyrPage.personalMemoriesSubtitle: Personal memories shared by those who knew them.

searchResults.title: Search Results
searchResults.noResultsMessage: The archive search returned no results matching your criteria. Please adjust your search parameters.

shareMemory.title: Tell Us Who They Were
shareMemory.subtitle: Share a personal memory or tribute to honor their legacy.
shareMemory.noMatchFound: No match found in the archive.
shareMemory.introText: Tell us who they were. Every story, every photo, every voice note helps keep their memory alive. This is a living archive — built by the people, for the people.
shareMemory.step1Subtitle: Search for a martyr by name.
shareMemory.step2Title: What would you like to share?
shareMemory.storyPlaceholder: Share what you remember about them... a moment, a habit, something they said...
shareMemory.photoUploadTitle: Click to upload a photo or video
shareMemory.voiceUploadTitle: Click to record a voice note
shareMemory.reviewNotice: All submissions are reviewed before publishing. We treat every memory with dignity and respect.
shareMemory.successMessage: Your memory has been submitted for review. Our team will carefully review and publish it with the utmost respect.
shareMemory.submissionSuccess: Your memory has been submitted for review. Our team will carefully review and publish it with the utmost respect.
